tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(2,12): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(3,7): error TLUA1359: Identifier expected. 'until' is a reserved word that cannot be used here.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(3,13): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(4,9): error TLUA7010: '(Missing)', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(4,10): error TLUA1359: Identifier expected. 'repeat' is a reserved word that cannot be used here.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(5,1): error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(10,5): error TLUA1005: 'then' expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(16,37): error TLUA2366: Function lacks ending return statement and return type does not include 'undefined'.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(28,3): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(28,17): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(31,4): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua(32,1): error TLUA1005: 'end' expected.


==== tluaControlFlowSyntaxErrors.tlua (13 errors) ====
    // Reserved words cannot be binding names.
    local then = 1;
          ~~~~
!!! error TLUA1359: Identifier expected. 'then' is a reserved word that cannot be used here.
               ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    local until = 2;
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1359: Identifier expected. 'until' is a reserved word that cannot be used here.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    function repeat(): void
            
!!! error TLUA7010: '(Missing)', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.
             ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1359: Identifier expected. 'repeat' is a reserved word that cannot be used here.
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
    
    // Missing `then`.
    function missingThen(flag: boolean): number
      if flag
        return 1;
        ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: 'then' expected.
      end
      return 0;
    end
    
    // Missing `end`.
    function missingEnd(flag: boolean): number
                                        ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2366: Function lacks ending return statement and return type does not include 'undefined'.
      if flag then
        return 1;
      return 0;
    end
    
    // elseif after else.
    function elseifAfterElse(n: number): number
      if n == 1 then
        return 1;
      else
        return 2;
      elseif n == 3 then
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                    ~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
        return 3;
      end
    end

!!! error TLUA1005: 'end' expected.
